name: Antipasto Spread
recipeIngredient: 2 4-oz cans mushroom stems and pieces, drained and finely chopped
1 14-oz can artichoke hearts, drained and finely chopped
1 10-oz jar pimiento-stuffed olives, drained and finely chopped
1 6-oz can ripe olives, drained and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients, mixing well; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients and bring to a boil.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetables and place in a large jar with a tight-fitting lid.
4. Shake the jar to stir the ingredients and refrigerate overnight.
5. Serve the spread with assorted crackers.
